title: alternanthera elongata var. nigriceps
intro: Alternanthera elongata var. nigriceps, also known as the Black Jewel Flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Alternanthera elongata var. nigriceps include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
